languages.text: "Имперский закон превыше любых кровных уз". {n}Аристократка вскидывает руку в назидательном жесте.{/n} "Мой отец предал веру и позволил ереси завладеть собой".
"Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."
languages.original_text: "Имперский закон превыше любых кровных уз". {n}Аристократка вскидывает руку в назидательном жесте.{/n} "Мой отец предал веру и позволил ереси завладеть собой".

traits.locale_text: "Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."
"Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."
"Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."

languages.text: «La Lex Imperialis está por encima de todo lazo de sangre». {n}Alza una mano en un gesto de reprensión.{/n} «Mi padre ha traicionado a la fe y ha permitido que lo consuma la herejía».
languages.original_text: "Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."

traits.locale_text: «La Lex Imperialis está por encima de todo lazo de sangre». {n}Alza una mano en un gesto de reprensión.{/n} «Mi padre ha traicionado a la fe y ha permitido que lo consuma la herejía».

languages.text: “帝国法律高于一切血脉亲情。”{n}她抬起手作出训诫状。{/n}“我父亲背叛了信仰，任由异端侵蚀了他的心智。”
languages.original_text: "Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."

traits.locale_text: “帝国法律高于一切血脉亲情。”{n}她抬起手作出训诫状。{/n}“我父亲背叛了信仰，任由异端侵蚀了他的心智。”

languages.text: « La loi impériale passe avant les liens du sang, si étroits soient-ils, {n}dit-elle en levant la main comme pour vous faire la leçon.{/n} Mon père a trahi la foi et cédé aux sirènes de l'hérésie. »
languages.original_text: "Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."

traits.locale_text: « La loi impériale passe avant les liens du sang, si étroits soient-ils, {n}dit-elle en levant la main comme pour vous faire la leçon.{/n} Mon père a trahi la foi et cédé aux sirènes de l'hérésie. »

languages.text: "İmparatorluk Yasası, tüm kan bağlarının üstündedir." {n}İkaz edici bir hareketle elini kaldırıyor.{/n} "Babam inanca ihanet etti, kâfirliğin onu ele geçirmesine izin verdi."
languages.original_text: "Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."

traits.locale_text: "İmparatorluk Yasası, tüm kan bağlarının üstündedir." {n}İkaz edici bir hareketle elini kaldırıyor.{/n} "Babam inanca ihanet etti, kâfirliğin onu ele geçirmesine izin verdi."

languages.text: "Das imperiale Gesetz steht über allen Blutbanden." {n}Sie hebt ihre Hand zu einer mahnenden Geste.{/n} "Mein Vater hat den Glauben verraten und sich der Ketzerei hingegeben."
languages.original_text: "Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."

traits.locale_text: "Das imperiale Gesetz steht über allen Blutbanden." {n}Sie hebt ihre Hand zu einer mahnenden Geste.{/n} "Mein Vater hat den Glauben verraten und sich der Ketzerei hingegeben."

languages.text: 「皇の法は血縁を超える」{n}彼女は警告のジェスチャーで手を挙げた。{/n}「父は信仰を裏切り、異端の思想に染まっていた」
languages.original_text: "Imperial Law is above all ties of blood." {n}She raises her hand in an admonishing gesture.{/n} "My father betrayed the faith and allowed heresy to take hold of him."

traits.locale_text: 「皇の法は血縁を超える」{n}彼女は警告のジェスチャーで手を挙げた。{/n}「父は信仰を裏切り、異端の思想に染まっていた」
